secretaryOfState.agency: West Virginia Secretary of State Business and Licensing Division

hours.regular: Charleston: Monday-Friday, 8:30 a.m.-5:00 p.m.; Clarksburg and Martinsburg: Monday-Friday, 9:00 a.m.-5:00 p.m.

physicalAddresses.label: North Central WV Business Center
physicalAddresses.street: 153 West Main Street, Suite G, Third Floor

renewals.notes: WV Code §59-1-2a: annual report and $25 filing fee between January 1 and June 30 each year following the calendar year of registration. Online filings through Business4WV add a $1 portal fee. Failure to file by June 30 may result in penalties and administrative dissolution.

filingFacts.llcFeeNotes: Articles of Organization for a domestic LLC/PLLC: $100. An additional $1.00 online processing fee applies to all online filings (WV SOS register a new business).
filingFacts.nameReservationNotes: Name reservation reserves the name for 120 days; fee $15 per established SOS schedule.

sources.name: West Virginia register a new business fees
